title: Implement an Event Emitter
input_format: Method calls: on(event, callback), off(event, callback), emit(event, ...args), once(event, callback)
output_format: An EventEmitter class that manages event subscriptions and emissions
constraints: Event names are strings. Callbacks are functions. Multiple listeners per event.
function_signature: class EventEmitter { on(event: string, cb: Function): void; off(event: string, cb: Function): void; emit(event: string, ...args: any[]): void; once(event: string, cb: Function): void; }
